creator: jhb@FreeBSD.org
text:
It is kind of annoying that if you ever do a onestart of local_unbound (or enable it rc.conf and later disable it), you end up with it setup in resolvconf.conf, possibly without realizing it even happened. :-/

Thanks for testing and replying!

For the original ticket, I do think the change to enable use of resolvconf on FreeBSD should fix that issue.
